name: openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG
description: The cinnamon SIG is committed to introducing cinnamon desktop into the openEuler community, and performing related adaptation, migration and optimization, making it one of the server desktop environments officially supported by the openEuler community.

name: openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG maintains 31 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The cinnamon SIG is committed to introducing cinnamon desktop into the openEuler community, and performing related adaptation, migration and optimization, making it one of the server desktop environments officially supported by the openEuler community.. The SIG has 6 core members and maintains 31 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at NA; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG maintains 31 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-cinnamon.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-cinnamon SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: DingWenlong, ZhangLin, DengWeijin. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
